Good day everyone and in this video I'm gonna discuss and frequently ask questions for the tastiest protein in the world. Oh the very first question, how much should I take? The irresponsible part of me says take as much as you damn well please because it is food and really it is freaking delicious. So I suggest you eat as much as you want. Secondarily, one this food this food does contain calories so if you are accounting for your calories make sure that you just don't go over your protein allotment. You only need so much. If you want more that's fine I will not stop you. So one scoop is 20 grams of protein so multiply up as needed. Question number two, when should I take this? Daily, weekly, hourly, whatever. So this can be used in place of a protein source in a typical meal and I also suggest that you use this during meals that one you may need to consume protein and don't want something in your stomach that's very heavy perhaps before training or after training or as a snack before bed. So those are probably the best times to take this during times you're not terribly hungry or you want something sweet. How? With food or liquid? One I do not suggest you consume the powder without fluid. I have tried it is a bit cakey so you can consume this with a minimum amount of fluid to create like a sludgy starchy pudding or you can go in between 8 to 16 ounces of fluid to make a shake with the palatability that you desire and with food absolutely because it is food. Alright next, cycling, starting and stopping. This is a product that you can consume on a daily basis multiple times a day with no problems at all. Lastly what happens if you skip? It's all good. So you can double up doses next time. It is twice as delicious and like I said it is food so if it is a good portion of your calories you can consume more than one serving at a time with no issue and there are enzyme complexes in place in the product to make sure it is digestible.
